**Formaldehyde Fukui reactivity — computed result.**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui functions from DFT single-point charge differences using **tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP)**, gas phase, neutral reference **charge 0, multiplicity 1**. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (4 atoms: O, C, H, H). Backend/program reported by chemkit: `dft`; partial charges: **Mulliken (PySCF)**. N+1/N−1 states used by the tool: cation charge +1, multiplicity 2; anion charge −1, multiplicity 2. Software version was not reported by the tool.
